Title: Register User
Steps: 1. Go to home page 2. Click Signup/Login 3. Enter name+email, click Signup 4. Fill account info form 5. Click Create Account 6. Click Continue 7. Delete Account (cleanup)
Expected Result: Account is created, session is authenticated, and teardown succeeds with no orphaned data

Title: Login with correct email and password
Steps: 1. Go to Signup/Login 2. Enter correct email/password 3. Click Login
Expected Result: User is authenticated; header shows Logged in as <username>

Title: Login with incorrect email/password
Steps: 1. Go to Signup/Login 2. Enter wrong email/password 3. Click Login
Expected Result: Error 'Your email or password is incorrect!' is shown; no session created

Title: Logout User
Steps: 1. Click Logout
Expected Result: User is redirected to login page; session cleared

Title: Register with an already-registered email
Preconditions: An account already exists for the email used
Steps: 1. Go to Signup/Login 2. Enter name + existing email 3. Click Signup
Expected Result: Error 'Email Address already exist!' is displayed; no duplicate created

Title: Contact Us form
Steps: 1. Go to Contact Us 2. Fill name/email/subject/message 3. Upload a file 4. Click Submit
Expected Result: Success message shown; Home button returns to home page

Title: Search Product
Steps: 1. Go to Products 2. Enter keyword in search box 3. Click search
Expected Result: Only products matching the keyword are returned; result count > 0

Title: Add Products to Cart
Steps: 1. Go to Products 2. Add first product to cart, Continue Shopping 3. Add second product to cart, View Cart
Expected Result: Both products appear with correct price/qty/total = price x qty

Title: Verify product quantity in Cart
Steps: 1. Open a product detail page 2. Set quantity to 4 3. Add to cart, View Cart
Expected Result: Cart shows the product with quantity exactly 4 and line total = unit price x 4

Title: Remove Products from Cart
Preconditions: A product is in the cart
Steps: 1. Click the remove (X) icon on a cart row
Expected Result: Row is removed without a page reload; total recalculates immediately

Title: Place Order: Register before Checkout
Steps: 1. Register a new account 2. Add products to cart 3. Proceed to Checkout 4. Review address/order 5. Place Order 6. Fill payment details 7. Confirm 8. Delete account
Expected Result: Order total matches cart total; success confirmation shown; account cleanup succeeds
Automated: No - manual (simulated non-idempotent payment form kept manual by design)

Title: Place Order: Login before Checkout
Steps: Same as TC-11 but starting from Login instead of Signup
Expected Result: Same as TC-11 - order confirms successfully

Title: Verify Test Cases Page
Steps: 1. Go to home page 2. Click 'Test Cases' in the top nav 3. Observe the page
Expected Result: The Test Cases page loads and lists the site's published scenarios (the same list this project's traceability matrix maps against)

Title: Verify product detail page
Steps: 1. Go to Products 2. Click on any product 3. Observe the detail page
Expected Result: Detail page shows product name, category, price, availability, condition, and brand - not just a redirect back to the listing

Title: Verify Subscription on home page
Steps: 1. Go to home page 2. Scroll to footer 3. Enter a valid email in the Subscription field 4. Click the arrow/submit button
Expected Result: Success message 'You have been successfully subscribed!' is displayed

Title: Verify Subscription on Cart page
Steps: 1. Go to Cart page 2. Scroll to footer 3. Enter a valid email in the Subscription field 4. Click the arrow/submit button
Expected Result: Same success message as TC-15, confirming the footer widget is consistent across pages

Title: Place Order: Register while Checkout
Steps: 1. Add a product to cart 2. Proceed to Checkout 3. Click 'Register / Login' when prompted mid-checkout 4. Register a new account 5. Return to checkout automatically 6. Confirm the cart survived the detour 7. Place Order 8. Delete account
Expected Result: Cart contents persist across the mid-checkout registration detour; order completes as in TC-11
Automated: No - manual (same non-idempotent-payment rationale as TC-11/TC-12)

Title: View Category Products
Steps: 1. Go to home page 2. In the left sidebar, click a category (e.g. Women > Dress) 3. Observe the category page
Expected Result: Page header confirms the selected category (e.g. 'WOMEN - DRESS PRODUCTS') and only matching products are listed

Title: View & Cart Brand Products
Steps: 1. Go to Products 2. In the left sidebar under Brands, click a brand (e.g. Polo) 3. Observe the brand page 4. Add a listed product to cart
Expected Result: Brand page header confirms the selected brand and only matching products are listed; add-to-cart works identically to the main catalog

Title: Search Products and Verify Cart After Login
Steps: 1. While logged out, search for a product 2. Add it to cart 3. Log in with an existing account 4. View Cart
Expected Result: The cart item added while logged out is still present after logging in - the session merge doesn't silently drop it

Title: Add review on product
Steps: 1. Open a product detail page 2. Click the 'Write Your Review' tab 3. Fill name, email, and review text 4. Click Submit
Expected Result: Confirmation message 'Thank you for your review.' is displayed

Title: Add to cart from Recommended items
Steps: 1. Go to home page 2. Scroll to the 'recommended items' carousel 3. Click 'Add to cart' on a listed product 4. View Cart
Expected Result: The recommended-item product appears in the cart with the correct price

Title: Verify address details in checkout page
Preconditions: A registered account with known address details
Steps: 1. Register an account with specific, known address details 2. Add a product to cart 3. Proceed to Checkout 4. Compare the displayed delivery address block to what was entered at registration
Expected Result: The checkout page's delivery address exactly matches the account's registered address - no field is silently dropped or mismatched
Automated: No - manual (reachable only via the same checkout flow kept manual in TC-11/TC-12/TC-17)

Title: Download Invoice after purchase order
Steps: 1. Complete an order per TC-11 2. On the order confirmation page, click 'Download Invoice' 3. Verify the file downloads
Expected Result: An invoice file downloads successfully and contains the correct order total and line items
Automated: No - manual (depends on completing the same non-idempotent payment flow as TC-11)

Title: Verify Scroll Up using 'Arrow' button
Steps: 1. Open any long page (e.g. Products) 2. Scroll down until the scroll-up arrow icon appears 3. Click it
Expected Result: Page scrolls smoothly back to the top
Automated: No - manual (low business value UI chrome, not worth automation maintenance cost)

Title: Verify Scroll Up without 'Arrow' button
Steps: 1. Open any long page 2. Scroll down 3. Scroll back up manually (mouse wheel/trackpad)
Expected Result: Standard scroll behaves normally with nothing obstructing it (e.g. no sticky element trapping scroll)
